Uses of Interface
org.attoparser.select.IMarkupSelectorReferenceResolver

Packages that use IMarkupSelectorReferenceResolver
Package
Description
org.attoparser.select
Handlers for filtering a part or several parts of markup during parsing in a fast and efficient way.

  • Uses of IMarkupSelectorReferenceResolver in org.attoparser.select

    Constructors in org.attoparser.select with parameters of type IMarkupSelectorReferenceResolver
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    BlockSelectorMarkupHandler(IMarkupHandler selectedHandler, String[] selectors, IMarkupSelectorReferenceResolver referenceResolver)
    Create a new instance of this handler, specifying the selected handler, as well as a markup selector reference resolver and the selectors to be used.
     
    BlockSelectorMarkupHandler(IMarkupHandler selectedHandler, String selector, IMarkupSelectorReferenceResolver referenceResolver)
    Create a new instance of this handler, specifying the selected handler, as well as a markup selector reference resolver and the selector to be used.
     
    BlockSelectorMarkupHandler(IMarkupHandler selectedHandler, IMarkupHandler nonSelectedHandler, String[] selectors, IMarkupSelectorReferenceResolver referenceResolver)
    Create a new instance of this handler, specifying both the selected and non-selected handlers, as well as a markup selector reference resolver and the selectors to be used.
     
    BlockSelectorMarkupHandler(IMarkupHandler selectedHandler, IMarkupHandler nonSelectedHandler, String selector, IMarkupSelectorReferenceResolver referenceResolver)
    Create a new instance of this handler, specifying both the selected and non-selected handlers, as well as a markup selector reference resolver and the selector to be used.
     
    NodeSelectorMarkupHandler(IMarkupHandler selectedHandler, IMarkupHandler nonSelectedHandler, String[] selectors, IMarkupSelectorReferenceResolver referenceResolver)
    Create a new instance of this handler, specifying both the selected and non-selected handlers, as well as a markup selector reference resolver and the selectors to be used.
     
    NodeSelectorMarkupHandler(IMarkupHandler selectedHandler, IMarkupHandler nonSelectedHandler, String selector, IMarkupSelectorReferenceResolver referenceResolver)
    Create a new instance of this handler, specifying both the selected and non-selected handlers, as well as a markup selector reference resolver and the selector to be used.
